content: i tested it and the attacker loses. the counter kills and the rest go off but since attacker died first they lose
i think you misunderstand. I'm saying if counter is in front of allies killing lily. it should be defender win. lily lose.
i tried it with multihit, but not yet w aoe. it seems like it will work same as multihit though. hit kill, counter die, lose game, hit kill, hit kill, hit kill.
i know if it's just a regular lily kills everyone, no counter kill, lily takes recoil after enemies die and she wins.
if lily oneshots the counter she will continue hitting everyone else
thats why the dmg is important
if she doesnt then you just get countered
i know she hits, i said she does. but if she's last one alive i think she loses to counter killing her before the rest of enemy team dies.
counter doesnt hit if your attack immediately kills them
if you dont one hit then you get the dmg proc and die
aching fin happens to trigger dmg dealt 50% self dmg after the entire card is over
so it doesnt actually kill you since you "win" killing last enemy before it triggers
yeah. still nice to learn about multihit interaction
